title: Easy Skeletons
description: Makes skeletons adjustable to your will. Also adds new items and features.
body:
# Easy Skeletons

This mod is designed for people that find the vanilla skeletons too difficult. Within this mod you can adjust the skeletons to your will.

## How to adjust these skeletons:

First you need to set a keybind for the settings menu: "Open Settings" under "Easy Skeletons" in the Keybinds menu.

Once you have opened this menu, you can change a few values:

- Skeleton Mode:

> - Harmless: Skeletons walk around not doing any harm.
> - Vanilla: Skeleton work as if it was just Vanilla Minecraft.
> - Adjustable: Enables the difficulty slider. Now you can adjust the skeletons speed with the slider.

- Difficulty slider (ranges from 0% to 200% difficulty):

> - 0% being: standing still and shooting forward.
> - 200% being: looking at target with rapid speeds.

These values can also be changed with commands:

- Skeleton Mode: "skeletonmode", allowed values: Off, Harmless, Vanilla, Adjustable
- Skeleton Difficulty: "skeletondifficulty", allows values within range 0-200
  
## This mod also adds a few new features such as:

- Skeleton Killer item:

> - Allows you to remove skeletons from this world with one punch.
> - Summons Suspicious Floating Skeleton Head when right clicking a block (only available when having the Skeleton Elimination advancement).

- Skeleton Killer advancement: Obtain a Skeleton Killer item.

- Skeleton Elimination advancement: Kill 20 skeletons with the Skeleton Killer item.

- Suspicious Floating Skeleton Head: Shoots at all living entities within range (except for it's summoner).

## This applies to:
- Skeletons
- Wither Skeletons
- Strays
